title: Show All 'My Work' Items In View
excerpt: Missed Board Items in ‘My Work’ view, would like all uncompleted items to show in ‘My Work’ for our users.  Monday.com support account represntative advised to seek Community support site page for future feature request. …

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: Missed Board Items in ‘My Work’ view, would like all uncompleted items to show in ‘My Work’ for our users. Monday.com support account represntative advised to seek Community support site page for future feature request.
